dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The system maintained 100% schema validation success across all reasoning spans. Both the 'rules-context-loader' and 'alignment-engine' executed successfully, ensuring adherence to the architectural governance framework and schema-constrained output requirements.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' processing utilized 54,427 tokens. While slightly lower than the baseline of 56,365, the depth of analysis into architectural evolution remains high, and the subsequent success of the intent generator confirms causal integrity.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment engine processed 31,130 tokens, exceeding the baseline of 30,966. This suggests sustained or increased complexity in trade-off resolution. The successful generation of the architecture intent document indicates effective tension reconciliation.
